results.rendered_html: 1. sima mfn. (prob. connected with 1. sama; abl. simasmāt dat. simasmai; voc. simā [ Padap.  sima,  RV. viii, 41 ]; n. pl. sime) all, every, whole, entire (accord. to some = śreṣṭha; accord. to others = ātman, ‘one's self’),  RV.

results.rendered_html: 1. sima pron.  UṆĀDIS. 1,143  (sima)  ŚĀNT. 4,10. fg.  (soll auch tonlos sein). gaṇa sarvādi zu  P. 1,1,27 .  VOP. 3,9 . jeder, all  NIR. 4,11 . ucchukramatkamajate simasmāt  ṚV. 1,95,7 . amitakratuḥ simaḥ 102,6 . rātrī vāsastanute simasmai 115,4 . tamitpṛcchānta na simo vi pṛcchati 145,2 . sima ukṣṇo 'vasṛṣṭā~ adanti 10,28,11 . Angeblich so v. a. śreṣṭha. sima iti vai śreṣṭhamācakṣata iti vājasaneyakam  SĀY. _zu_ ṚV. 8,4,1 .

results.rendered_html: 2. sima so v. a. śima. aśvasya vājinastvaci simāḥ śamyantu śamyantīḥ  VS. 23,37 . 42 , wo das fem. śamyantīḥ irrig in den Text gekommen zu sein scheint; vgl.  TS. 5,2,12,1 . nach  MAHĪDH.  = sīmā so v. a. rekhā.
